sections.heading: General updates
sections.body:
[iOS] Upgrade Tunnel SDK to version 2.0.0
[iOS & Android] Upgrade OneAuth SDK to version 9.3.3

sections.heading: New Policies
sections.body:
[iOS & Android] Added support for the
CopilotNewTabPageEnabled
policy to configure the availability of the Copilot new tab page
Microsoft Edge Browser Policy Documentation â CopilotNewTabPageEnabled | Microsoft Learn

sections.heading: Bug fixes
sections.body:
[iOS] Fix the issue about data leak under
IncognitoModeAvailability
policy
[Android] Fix the issue where the Policies of Brand Info does not work under some environment

sections.heading: New enhancements
sections.body:
[iOS] Improve the user experience of Copilot New Tab Card
[iOS & Android] Improve the user experience of Copilot Multi Tab Summary feature
[iOS & Android] Improve the user experience of Copilot Video Summary feature
[iOS & Android] Improve the user experience of Web single sign on

sections.heading: New Policies
sections.body:
[Android] Support New Policy of
DownloadBlockedForFileTypes
for allows to specify a list of file type extensions that are blocked from downloading (Policy document
Microsoft Edge Browser Policy Documentation DownloadBlockedForFileTypes | Microsoft Learn
)
[Android] Support New Policy of
ManagedTopSites
for control a list of managed top site shortcuts displayed on the New Tab Page (Policy document
Microsoft Edge Browser Policy Documentation ManagedTopSites | Microsoft Learn
)

sections.heading: Bug fixes
sections.body:
[Android] Fix the file upload to
OneDrive
failing issue under Intune MAM
[Android] Fix the issue about file upload from
OneDrive
failing under Intune
[Android] Fix the issue about opening attachments in Outlook.com triggers switch to personal account sometimes

sections.heading: New enhancements
sections.body:
[Android] Improve the user experience of AAD Copilot
[Android] Improve the user experience of Copilot New Tab Card
[Android] Improve the user experience of the Policies of
NewTabPage.BrandLogo
and
NewTabPage.BrandColor

sections.heading: General updates
sections.body:
[iOS] Upgrade Intune MAM SDK to version 21.5.1
[iOS] Upgrade Tunnel SDK to version 1.7.1

sections.heading: New Policies
sections.body:
[iOS] Support New Policy of
DownloadBlockedForFileTypes
for allows to specify a list of file type extensions that are blocked from downloading (Policy document
Microsoft Edge Browser Policy Documentation DownloadBlockedForFileTypes | Microsoft Learn
)
[iOS] Support New Policy of
ManagedTopSites
for control a list of managed top site shortcuts displayed on the New Tab Page (Policy document
Microsoft Edge Browser Policy Documentation ManagedTopSites | Microsoft Learn
)

sections.heading: Bug fixes
sections.body:
[iOS] Fix the issue where the exit InPrivate button still show when
IncognitoModeAvailability
policy is set to forced
[iOS] Fix the Policy of
SmartScreenAllowListDomains
not work as expected
[iOS] Fix the Policy of
BlockSignIn
not work as expected

sections.heading: New enhancements
sections.body:
[iOS] Support to view SSL/TLS certificate information from the
PageInfo
panel (Under Experiment)
[iOS] Improve the user experience under incognito mode
[iOS] Improve the user experience of AAD Copilot
[iOS] Improve the user experience of Copilot New Tab Card
[iOS] Improve the user experience of the Policies of
NewTabPage.BrandLogo
and
NewTabPage.BrandColor

sections.heading: General Updates
sections.body:
[Android]
Upgrade OneAuth SDK to version
9.1.0

sections.heading: Bug Fixes
sections.body:
[Android]
Fix issue where policy IncognitoModeAvailability did not work as expected.
[Android]
Fix issue where file uploads to OneDrive failed under Intune MAM.

sections.heading: New Enhancements
sections.body:
[Android]
Improve user experience during Google enterprise enrollment.
[Android]
Improve user experience under Shared Device Mode.

sections.heading: General Updates
sections.body:
[iOS]
Upgrade Intune MAM SDK to version
21.5.0
[iOS]
Upgrade Tunnel SDK to version
1.7.0
[iOS]
Upgrade OneAuth SDK to version
9.1.0

sections.heading: New Policies
sections.body:
[iOS]
Support new policy
AllowSurfGame
to configure whether users can play the Surf game.   Policy documentation:
Microsoft Edge Browser Policy Documentation â AllowSurfGame
[iOS]
Support new policy
AntiParallelOnStartUpEnabled
to configure prevention of parallel page loading from restored tabs and external-link tabs on startup.

sections.heading: Bug Fixes
sections.body:
[iOS]
Resolve data leak issue allowing unmanaged files to open under InPrivate mode.
[iOS]
Resolve data leak issue related to protected file opening in InPrivate mode under Intune MAM.
[iOS]
Fix issue where opening downloaded PDF files was blocked when Allowed URLs is enabled in Intune App Configuration.

sections.heading: New Enhancements
sections.body:
[iOS]
Improve user experience for policies NewTabPage.BrandLogo and NewTabPage.BrandColor.

sections.heading: General updates
sections.body:
[iOS & Android]
Support Copilot Mode FRE New UI for MSA users
[iOS & Android]
Support Copilot Prompt Card in NTP for AAD users
[iOS & Android]
Support Copilot Summary Notification in Address bar for AAD users
[iOS]
Upgrade Intune MAM SDK to version 21.4.0
[iOS & Android]
Upgrade OneAuth SDK to version 8.2.1

sections.heading: New policies
sections.body:
[iOS]
Support New Policy of ManagedTopSites for configure managed top sites on New Tab Page
(Policy document
Microsoft Edge Browser Policy Documentation ManagedTopSites | Microsoft Learn
)
[iOS & Android]
Support New Policy of ReadAloudEnabled for enable Read Aloud feature
(Policy document
Microsoft Edge Browser Policy Documentation ReadAloudEnabled | Microsoft Learn
)
[iOS & Android]
Support New Policy of EdgeEDropEnabled for enable Drop feature
(Policy document
Microsoft Edge Browser Policy Documentation EdgeEDropEnabled | Microsoft Learn
)
[iOS & Android]
Support New Policy of ManagedNtpShortcuts for configure managed shortcuts on the New Tab Page
(Policy document
Microsoft Edge Browser Policy Documentation ManagedNtpShortcuts | Microsoft Learn
)
[iOS & Android]
Support New Policy about Copilot Mode for AAD users (Policy document
Manage Microsoft Edge on iOS and Android With Intune - Microsoft Intune | Microsoft Learn
)

sections.heading: Bug fixes
sections.body:
[iOS]
Resolve the Data leak issue about protected file opening in InPrivate mode
[iOS]
Resolve the Data leak issue caused by identity switch not being able to handle External Files correctly
[iOS]
Fix the issue where attempting to open OneDrive downloaded files was failing
[iOS]
Fix brand information fetch failure for some case under BrandLogo and BrandColor policy configure
[Android]
Fix crash issue when Intune blocks print action

sections.heading: New enhancements
sections.body:
[iOS]
Improve the user experience of PacProxy
[Android]
Improve the user experience of Share Device Mode
